name: google-antigravity-codex
description: Codex skills and MCP tools centered on the official Google Antigravity CLI, with an opt-in experimental legacy backend.

interface.shortDescription: Native Antigravity plugin and guarded local helpers.
interface.longDescription: Google Antigravity Codex provides Codex skills and an MCP stdio server centered on the official agy CLI, plus guarded local writing and release helpers. Legacy direct Code Assist tools are disabled unless explicitly enabled for isolated compatibility testing.
defaultPrompt: Check the native Antigravity plugin bundle.
Polish this prose using the host model.
Draft release notes from the current repo.
Route this task to the best Antigravity model.
Review this code using the host model.
Run an Antigravity plugin doctor check.
